blockers.description: First Vercel deploy attempt failed at Next.js 'Collecting page data' phase with 'DATABASE_URL is not set'. The 7 env vars added during the import wizard either (a) did not get saved to Production scope, or (b) only got saved to Preview/Development. Next.js production build needs Production env vars at build time because lib/db/index.ts:5-8 throws synchronously on module load and lib/auth imports it.
